title: Kilasan Kode di Balik Koleksi
theme: Menemukan keindahan dan makna tersembunyi dalam benda-benda lama, membuka sebuah petualangan kecil yang tak terduga.

cover.prompt: An expansive, overcast urban view seen from an interior window during a late afternoon. In the foreground, a sleek camera lens rests gently on a simple surface, hinting at a moment of creative stillness. The environment evokes a sense of calm reflection and a gentle search for inspiration amidst the city's subdued colors. Subtle ambient lighting highlights the quiet texture of the scene.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, cool and muted color grading

meta.plan_summary: A photography student, seeking inspiration for her final project, visits an old museum. While photographing an ancient relief, she discovers hidden, coded symbols. Through dedicated research, she deciphers a secret, heartwarming message—a personal love story from an artist of the past. This discovery brings her deep satisfaction and fresh inspiration, transforming her perspective on art and life.
meta.target_emotion: Warm satisfaction, inspiration, wonder, joy, intellectual curiosity
